ai_summary: Dolphin Offshore Enterprises (India) Limited has established a new wholly-owned subsidiary, Beluga International (IFSC) Private Limited, which has secured provisional registration in Gujarat's GIFT City. This strategic move aims to diversify the company's business into financial services, specifically the operating lease of ships and ocean vessels, requiring an initial capital commitment of ₹1.82 crore; there are no immediate red flags as this entity is newly formed and yet to commence operations.
